pages.text: $(thing)Inverted Control$() is a disorienting status effect that reverses the player's movement inputs.
While affected:$(br)$(li)$(bold)W$() key = move backward$(li)$(bold)S$() key = move forward$(li)$(bold)A$() key = move right$(li)$(bold)D$() key = move left$(br2)Jumping and sneaking are unaffected.
